testcase.name: Provider Registration Form Validation › should show validation errors for empty required fields

failure.message: provider-registration.spec.js:28:7 should show validation errors for empty required fields

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › provider-registration.spec.js:28:7 › Provider Registration Form Validation › should show validation errors for empty required fields TimeoutError: page.waitForSelector: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('#validationErrorModal') to be visible 63 × locator resolved to hidden
…
31 | 32 | // Wait for validation error modal to appear > 33 | await page.waitForSelector('#validationErrorModal', { state: 'visible' }); | ^ 34 | 35 | // Check modal content 36 | await expect(page.locator('#validationErrorModal')).toBeVisible(); at C:\Users\Admin\Desktop\TheProject\Production\theproject_backend\tests\playwright\provider-registration.spec.js:33:16 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── test-results\provider-registration-Prov-ea0c5-s-for-empty-required-fields-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── test-results\provider-registration-Prov-ea0c5-s-for-empty-required-fields-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\test-results\provider-registration-Prov-ea0c5-s-for-empty-required-fields-chromium\error-context.md
